title: Wire .pushClaimed SubstrateEventKind so in-process DigikomaGitPushService can co-register with savepointd's PushService without double-push
description: DigikomaGitPushService.condition is currently .never to prevent both savepointd's PushService AND a directly-registered DigikomaGitPushService from racing the same .pushIntent event into two simultaneous pushes against the same .git. Mirrors the same gap in DigikomaSavepointService (parent session bead: digikoma-savepoint-chat-summary-wiring-v0.2 — same kind of v0.2 follow-up). Resolution: add a .pushClaimed(intentFilePath:) event kind in common-service emitted by savepointd's PushService once it has successfully claimed an intent from the queue. DigikomaGitPushService then subscribes to .pushClaimed (not .pushIntent) — meaning queue routing stays in savepointd while actual execution can move in-process for testing, embedded deployments, or future event-bus daemon hosts. Bumps DigikomaGitPushService.condition from .never to .always. Same pattern needed for SavepointService → DigikomaSavepointService handoff (parallel bead exists from parent session).
